resources.title: SeaweedFS
resources.evidence_quote: I'm using my preferred choice, which is SeaweedFS. It is a single go binary, very easy to operate, download, and run.

resources.title: Kopia
resources.evidence_quote: Next we have the uploader type of Kopia. This is now the default for Velero. You should not be using Restic anymore. It had corruption issues. Kopia is the way forward.

resources.title: Spectro Cloud Palette
resources.evidence_quote: Then we'll use Spectro Cloud's Palette to solve the problem. Centralized backup locations, standardized policies via cluster profiles and workspace level backups that protect multiple clusters together

resources.title: Spectro Cloud Palette Documentation
resources.evidence_quote: Head to docs.spectrocloud.com for examples of workspace backups, profile based policies, and real world scenarios.
